title: complete non-terminal surfacing (real-spawn 데모)
source_request: 남은 후보 #2 owner subagent 실제 spawn 라이브 실행 — 데모용 작은 실제 task(complete done-guard surfacing)를 실제 spawn된 subagent로 구동
goal: assembleCompletionFromGraph records non-terminal graph nodes as a remaining risk so a completion contract surfaces that graph work is unfinished

acceptance_criteria.statement: assembleCompletionFromGraph on a graph with a non-terminal node returns a completion whose remaining_risks contains an entry naming the non-terminal node ids.
assembleCompletionFromGraph on a graph where every node is passed returns a completion whose remaining_risks contains no non-terminal-node entry.
the full existing test suite returns 0 failures after the change.
